7 #include "arcane/IMesh.h"
8 
9 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/Utils.h"
10 
11 #include "BoundaryConditionTypes.h"
12 #include "IBoundaryCondition.h"
13 #include "IBoundaryConditionMng.h"
14 
15 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/IFunctionR4vR1.h"
16 #include "ScalarBoundaryCondition.h"
17 
18 #include "BoundaryConditionMngService.h"
19 
20 #include "ArcGeoSim/Appli/IAppServiceMng.h"
21 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ItemGroupBuilder.h"
22 
23 using namespace Arcane;
24 
25 void BoundaryConditionMngService::init() {
26  if(m_initialized) return;
27 
28  // Retrieve application service manager to access shared services
29  // IAppServiceMng* app_service_mng = IAppServiceMng::instance(subDomain()->serviceMng());
30 
31  // Retrieve shared expression parser service
32 
33  // Add boundary conditions
34  m_bcs.resize( options()->bc.size() );
35 
36  for(int i = 0; i < options()->bc.size(); i++) {
37  BoundaryConditionPtr bc_ptr =
38  new ScalarBoundaryCondition( options()->bc[i]->type(), options()->bc[i]->value() );
39 
40  m_bcs[i] = bc_ptr;
41  m_tag_2_bc[ "BC_" + options()->bc[i]->tag() ] = bc_ptr;
42  }
43 
44  // Check that corresponding face groups exist and build
45  // face unique id to boundary condition map
46  for(Tag2BoundaryConditionPtrMap::iterator ibc = m_tag_2_bc.begin(); ibc != m_tag_2_bc.end(); ibc++) {
47  const ItemGroup& bc_face_group = mesh()->findGroup( ibc->first );
48 
49  if( bc_face_group.null() ){
50 
51  if(ibc->first == "BC_allBoundaryFaces"){
52  ENUMERATE_FACE( iface, mesh()->allFaces() ) {
53  const Face& F = *iface;
54  if( F.isSubDomainBoundary() ) {
55  m_face_2_bc[F] = ibc->second;
56  }
57  }
58  }
59  else
60  warning() << "[BoundaryConditionMngService::init] Face group "
61  << ibc->first << " does not exist";
62 
63  }
64  else {
65  ENUMERATE_FACE( iface, bc_face_group ) {
66  const Face& F = *iface;
67  m_face_2_bc[F] = ibc->second;
68  }
69  }
70  }
71 
72  m_initialized = true;
73 
74  info() << "[BoundaryConditionMngService::init]"
75  << " Boundary condition manager initialized";
76 }
77 
79 
80 BoundaryConditionMngService::BoundaryConditionPtr
81 BoundaryConditionMngService::getBoundaryCondition(const Face& F) {
82  Face2BoundaryConditionPtrMap::iterator bc_it = m_face_2_bc.find(F);
83 
84  if( bc_it == m_face_2_bc.end() )
85  error() << "No boundary condition associated with face " << F.uniqueId();
86 
87  return bc_it->second;
88 }
89 
90 FaceGroup BoundaryConditionMngService::getFacesOfType(BoundaryConditionTypes::eType type) {
91  ItemGroupBuilder<Face> faces_builder(mesh(), IMPLICIT_NAME);
92  for(Face2BoundaryConditionPtrMap::iterator i = m_face_2_bc.begin(); i != m_face_2_bc.end(); i++)
93  if(i->second->getType() == type) faces_builder.add(i->first);
94  return faces_builder.buildGroup();
95 }
96 
97 FaceGroup BoundaryConditionMngService::getFacesNotOfType(BoundaryConditionTypes::eType type) {
98  ItemGroupBuilder<Face> faces_builder(mesh(), IMPLICIT_NAME);
99  for(Face2BoundaryConditionPtrMap::iterator i = m_face_2_bc.begin(); i != m_face_2_bc.end(); i++)
100  if(i->second->getType() != type) faces_builder.add(i->first);
101  return faces_builder.buildGroup();
102 }
103 
104 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_BOUNDARYCONDITIONMNG(BoundaryConditionMng,
105  BoundaryConditionMngService);
106
